energyOptimization.title: Energy Efficiency Optimization

applications.title: Comprehensive Thermal Dissipation Solutions
applications.subtitle: Providing professional thermal management solutions for various industries from consumer electronics to industrial applications

consumerElectronics.title: Consumer Electronics
consumerElectronics.description: In the consumer electronics field, we focus on solving thermal dissipation challenges for laptops, smartphones, gaming consoles, and wearable devices. As electronic products continue to upgrade in functionality, heat generation increases accordingly. Through innovative thermal design, high-performance material selection, and precise thermal flow simulation, we ensure products maintain optimal temperatures during high-performance operation. Our solutions not only enhance product stability and lifespan but also improve user experience.
consumerElectronics.app1: Laptop Heat Dissipation - High-performance thermal modules ensure extended operation without throttling
consumerElectronics.app2: Smartphone Cooling - Ultra-thin liquid cooling design for maximum efficiency in limited space
consumerElectronics.app3: Gaming Console Thermal Management - Multi-layer architecture supports extended high-performance gaming
consumerElectronics.app4: Wearable Device Heat Management - Lightweight solutions balance comfort with performance

unmanned.title: Unmanned Vehicles
unmanned.description: Unmanned vehicles such as drones and autonomous vehicles generate substantial heat during high-performance operation. We provide professional thermal management solutions ensuring unmanned vehicles maintain stable performance during extended flight or operation. Through optimized thermal design and material selection, we help customers extend flight time, enhance safety, and improve reliability.
unmanned.app1: Drone Heat Dissipation - Lightweight design maximizes flight endurance
unmanned.app2: Autonomous Vehicle Battery Cooling - High-performance systems ensure extended operation
unmanned.app3: Flight Control System Temperature Control - Precision control ensures flight stability
unmanned.app4: Power Battery Thermal Management - Professional modules extend battery lifespan

wearables.title: Wearable Products
wearables.description: Smart glasses and AR/VR wearable devices represent the next generation computing platform, presenting unprecedented thermal dissipation challenges. We have specifically developed innovative thermal solutions for smart glasses, achieving high-performance thermal dissipation within extreme space constraints. Through advanced thermal conductive materials and precision thermal management design, we ensure devices maintain comfortable temperatures during extended wear while preserving slim and elegant product form factors.
wearables.app1: AR/VR Glasses Heat Dissipation - Invisible thermal design maintains aesthetics
wearables.app2: Smart Glasses Temperature Control - Comfortable temperature when worn on skin
wearables.app3: Wearable Device Cooling - Lightweight design without adding wearing burden
wearables.app4: Thermal Conduction Module Design - Innovative micro-channel technology

industrial.title: Industrial & Communications
industrial.description: The industrial and communications sectors have the most stringent thermal management requirements. Server cabinets, 5G base stations, industrial computers, and high-power power supplies must operate stably for extended periods in high-temperature, high-humidity, and high-dust environments. We provide enterprise-grade thermal dissipation solutions including fanless designs, liquid cooling systems, and modular heat exchangers. These solutions not only enhance equipment reliability but also reduce operational costs and energy consumption.
industrial.app1: Server Cabinet Heat Dissipation - High-density design supports large-scale deployment
industrial.app2: 5G Base Station Cooling - Extreme environment adaptability ensures signal stability
industrial.app3: Industrial Computer Fanless Design - Reduces failure rates and maintenance costs
industrial.app4: High-Power Power Supply Thermal Management - Efficient dissipation enhances energy conversion

automotive.title: Automotive & Aerospace
automotive.description: Thermal management needs in automotive and aerospace sectors involve extreme conditions. Electric vehicle battery thermal dissipation and aircraft electronics temperature control applications have extremely high reliability and performance requirements. We provide targeted solutions including high-performance thermal modules, advanced material applications, and innovative design concepts. These solutions help customers achieve higher efficiency, extended service life, and superior safety performance.
automotive.app1: Electric Vehicle Battery Heat Dissipation - Efficient dissipation ensures battery lifespan and safety
automotive.app2: Aircraft Electronics Thermal Control - Thermal management for high-altitude environments
automotive.app3: Automotive Electronics Thermal Management - Lightweight high-performance solutions
automotive.app4: Aerospace Grade Reliability Certification - Passes strictest industry standards

cta.title: Ready to Solve Your Thermal Management Challenges?
cta.description: Our expert team is ready to provide customized solutions for your projects. No matter how complex your requirements are, we can find the most suitable solution.

technology.pageSubtitle: Therlect combines deep thermodynamic theory with innovative applied technology to solve the most challenging thermal management problems for our clients.
technology.thermalEngineeringDesc: Our thermodynamic engineering team focuses on heat generation, conversion, transfer, and utilization. Through advanced simulation analysis tools and extensive practical experience, we can accurately predict the thermal performance of products in real environments and provide optimized thermal dissipation designs.
technology.cfdAnalysisDesc: Using cutting-edge CFD software for precise thermal flow simulation, optimizing airflow fields and temperature distribution.
technology.moduleDesignDesc: Designing efficient, cost-effective, and compact customized heat dissipation modules for different product requirements.
technology.coreTechSubtitle: We offer multiple thermal dissipation solutions, from passive cooling to active cooling, meeting diverse application needs.
technology.passiveCoolingDesc: High-efficiency thermal solutions without active power consumption
technology.passiveCoolingFeature1: No fans or liquid cooling systems required, completely silent operation
technology.passiveCoolingFeature2: Utilizes natural convection and thermal conduction principles
technology.passiveCoolingFeature3: Suitable for low-power and noise-sensitive applications
technology.passiveCoolingFeature4: Heat sink design and material selection are critical
technology.passiveCoolingAppsDesc: LED lighting, low-power supplies, audio equipment, medical instruments, and other noise-sensitive applications.
technology.activeCoolingDesc: Actively driven high-performance thermal dissipation solutions
technology.activeCoolingFeature1: Air cooling: forced convection via fans for high thermal efficiency
technology.activeCoolingFeature2: Liquid cooling: water or other fluid circulation for ultra-high power applications
technology.activeCoolingFeature3: Automatic thermal intensity adjustment based on temperature
technology.activeCoolingFeature4: Suitable for high-power and high-performance equipment
technology.activeCoolingAppsDesc: Servers, high-performance computing, EV batteries, industrial equipment, 5G base stations, and other high-power applications.
technology.ctaTitle: Want to Learn More Technical Details?
technology.ctaDesc: Our engineering team is always ready to answer your technical questions and provide professional consulting services.

passiveCoolingPage.title: Passive Cooling Technology
passiveCoolingPage.subtitle: Efficient thermal dissipation solutions without active power consumption, achieving silent and reliable heat management through natural convection and thermal conduction.
passiveCoolingPage.principleDesc: Passive cooling utilizes natural physical phenomena such as thermal conduction, natural convection, and thermal radiation to transfer heat from heat sources to the environment without any mechanical moving parts or external energy.
passiveCoolingPage.advantage1Desc: No mechanical moving parts, achieving completely silent operation
passiveCoolingPage.advantage2Desc: No wearing parts, extremely long service life
passiveCoolingPage.advantage3Desc: No additional power supply needed, reducing system energy consumption

activeCoolingPage.title: Active Cooling Technology
activeCoolingPage.subtitle: Actively driven high-performance cooling solutions providing powerful thermal management for high-power devices through fan and liquid cooling systems.
activeCoolingPage.principleDesc: Active cooling uses external energy to drive cooling media (air or liquid) to forcibly take away heat, achieving more efficient thermal dissipation than passive methods, suitable for high heat flux density applications.
activeCoolingPage.advantage1Desc: Forced convection provides thermal performance far exceeding passive cooling
activeCoolingPage.advantage2Desc: Intelligent adjustment of cooling intensity based on real-time temperature
activeCoolingPage.advantage3Desc: Supports thermal management needs of hundreds of watts or higher
activeCoolingPage.advantage4Desc: Multiple solutions available including air cooling, liquid cooling, and TEC
